Interface ITemporalObservationsTable

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll
[Guid("A677AB5F-2FB8-11D5-B7E2-00010265ADC5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITemporalObservationsTable : ITemporalTable

Properties

AutoPurge

Indicates if the observation table will automatically purge observations that meet a specified criteria, Purge Rule, when the high-water mark has been exceeded.

bool AutoPurge { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IFields Fields { get; }

Property Value

IFields

GeometryColumnName 

string GeometryColumnName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

HasGeometry 

bool HasGeometry { get; }

Property Value

bool

Persistant

Reserved for future.

bool Persistant { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

PurgePercentage

The percentage of the maximum allowed number of records to delete when the Purge method is called.

double PurgePercentage { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PurgeRule

Identifies the purge rule to apply when PruneTable method is called (via user S/W or auto purge criteria).

enumPurgeRule PurgeRule { get; set; }

Property Value

enumPurgeRule

Examples

Sample Snippet

TemporalColumnName

The column that is responsible for providing the temporal information. This column must be a character (date/time string parsable) , date-time, timestamp, or time period.

string TemporalColumnName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Threshold

The high-water mark or the number of observations that should not be exceeded Threshold.

object Threshold { get; set; }

Property Value

object
